data.body:
## Context
Create tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh. This test must FAIL before Task 3 (migration) and PASS after it.

## TDD
Given: repo in current state (files at old paths, grep gate finds 20+ matches)
When: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
Then: exits non-zero (FAIL) because:
  1. grep gate finds matches; we assert exit 1 (no matches) -> fails
  2. cascade-replan-protocol.md not at new path -> fails
  3. docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ do not exist -> fails
  4. migrated test not at tests/skills/ -> fails
  5. migrated test does not run -> fails
After Task 3: all 5 assertions pass.

## Implementation
1. Create tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh with 5 assertions
2. chmod +x tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
3. Add to .test-index: plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md: tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh [test_plugin_boundary_migration]

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED marker tolerates failing test)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh
- [ ] Script exits non-zero in current state (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-plugin-boundary-migration.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for plugin boundary migration
  Verify: grep '\[test_plugin_boundary_migration\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
